(Production/Collecte/Transformation).
Originalité MooMe permet l'agrégation d'un dataset unique 
afin de réaliser des prédicitions pour les acteurs de 
l'écosystème laitier.
Activity MooMe is an AgriTech startup that plans 
to bridge data gaps in the dairy ecosystem via its two 
solutions MooMe Farmers and MooMe Business. 
Technological Aspect MooMe is a Cloud platform bringing 
together various stakeholders in the dairy ecosystem 
Production/Collection/Processing.
Originality MooMe allows the combination of a unique 
dataset to make predictions for the actors of the dairy 
ecosystem.

# Transforming Cattle Farming withClimate Intelligence
The all-in-one climate-integrated cattle (dairy & beef) platform empowering service providers to digitize farmers at scale while tracking carbon impact across Africa and Asia.
Discover the PlatformLearn More
10k+
Farmers in Network
2
Continents
99%
Smallholder Focus Through B2B Strategic Partnerships
## About MooMe
MooMe is the pioneering climate-integrated cattle platform addressing the urgent challenge of fragmented ecosystems in African and Asian cattle farming. We bridge the gap between service providers struggling to scale and data-blind farmers lacking digital management tools.
Our mission is to transform 99% of smallholder farmers across untapped markets by providing the first agri-cattle network with comprehensive climate tracking and carbon footprint monitoring. Unlike local solutions confined to single countries or global solutions targeting only large commercial farms, MooMe delivers innovative technology with plug-and-play integration.
We're building the future where service providers grow through data-enabled insights while farmers unlock revenue from both improved productivity and carbon credit monetization.
### Unique Climate Dataset
Climate-integrated cattle farm management combining technical, financial, and carbon tracking in one comprehensive platform.
### Technology Flexibility
APIs for seamless integration, plug-and-play solutions for agri-businesses, and customizations that adapt to local market needs.
### Untapped Markets Focus
First agri-cattle network targeting 99% of smallholders in Africa and Asia, where others focus on large commercial farms in developed markets.
## Discover the MooMe Platform
A comprehensive climate-integrated cattle platform designed for service providers, farmers, and sustainability partners across emerging markets.
Core Platform
### Farm Management Module
Core application for farmers and advisors covering herd, reproduction, milk production, financials, and production efficiency.
Climate Intelligence
### Impact Monitoring
Real-time sustainability and carbon footprint tracking for ESG-focused NGOs and climate funds with comprehensive dashboards.
Integration
### Partner Integration
Seamless API access and plug-and-play integration for service providers with existing applications or ERP systems.
Technology
### Mobile-First Design
Optimized for low-connectivity environments with offline capabilities and SMS integration for rural farmer access.
Security
### Data Security & Privacy
Enterprise-grade security with farmer data ownership rights and compliance with international privacy standards.
Revenue GenerationComing soon
### Carbon Credit Monetization
Automated methane and CO2 emissions tracking with carbon project development and verified credits marketplace access.
### See the Platform in Action
Explore interactive demos, case studies, and detailed impact reports showcasing real-world results from our climate-integrated solutions.
See How It Works
## MooMe Projects Timeline — Driving Climate-Smart Dairy Transformation
From Tunisia's first validation pilot to Kenya's flagship climate project — real impact across Africa and Asia with measurable results.
### Active & Completed Projects
ActiveB2B
### Livestock Services Alliance (LiSA)
Kenya
Q2 2025 Launch
Africa's first scalable, farmer-centric carbon project targeting 10% methane reduction and 20% productivity increase
$350k secured, 5,000 farmers + 115,000 cattle
$1.1M Total Budget
PilotB2B
### PT Frisian Flag Indonesia
Indonesia
2024 Completed
Enterprise-scale API integration with real-time data flow for feed optimization and herd health alerts
93% engagement rate achieved across farmer networks
PilotB2B
### FrieslandCampina Engro Pakistan
Pakistan
Completed 2023-2024
Scaling digital dairy platform across Pakistan's largest farmer network with feed optimization and milk quality tracking
Validated advanced management features such as feed efficiency and quality-based milk revenue calculation
SuccessFarmer
### Commercial Farms Algeria
Algeria
Completed 2023
Digital transformation of commercial dairy operations with data-driven management systems, improving productivity and operational efficiency through comprehensive farm digitization
40% improvement in farm management efficiency through digitization
SuccessFarmer
### Smallholder Dairy Farmers Morocco
Morocco
Completed 2023
Empowering smallholder farmers with digital tools and data analytics to optimize dairy operations, demonstrating the critical importance of data in modern farming practices
Data-driven insights increased milk quality by 25%
SuccessFarmer
### Commercial Farms Tunisia
Tunisia
Completed 2023
Advanced digitization program for commercial dairy operations, demonstrating how comprehensive data management enables farm scalability and sustainable growth in competitive markets
Scalability achieved through data integration - 200% growth capacity
SuccessB2B
### GIG Algeria (Insurance)
Algeria
Completed 2023
Strategic insurance sector collaboration proving how farm-level data enables service providers to develop innovative financial products, personalized risk assessment, and tailored insurance solutions for dairy operations
Data-driven insights enabled innovative financial service development for dairy farmers
SuccessFarmer
### Smallholder Dairy Farmers Rwanda
Rwanda
Completed 2022
Breakthrough localization project delivering MooMe app in Kinyarwanda dialect, proving our commitment to local adaptation. Data-driven approach increased farmer engagement by 85%
First localized app in Kinyarwanda - 'Inka n'amata' (Cow & Milk)
SuccessB2B
### Délice Group Tunisia
Tunisia
2022-On-going
First validation pilot: $40→$200 income per cow, up to 5x improvement for lowest producers
15% production increase, costs reduced $260→$70/farmer/year
SuccessB2B
### Techna Tunisie (Feed Industry)
Tunisia
Completed 2021
Partnership with feed industry leader demonstrating how farm-level data empowers service providers with targeted marketing capabilities, proactive interventions, and enhanced competitiveness in dairy supply chain optimization
Farm-level data enabled targeted marketing strategies and proactive service delivery
### Your Institution Here
Join MooMe's growing network of partners across Africa & Asia. Transform dairy farming in your region with climate-smart solutions.
Schedule Partnership Call
### In Development & Partnership Ready
ReadyB2B
### Leader in Genetics Products and Services
Kenya
2024-2025 Active
Genetic provider partnership delivering AI breeding programs and genomic selection tools to enhance dairy productivity
Improved genetic selection increasing milk yield by 25%
ReadyB2B
### Leader Dairy Processor
Ethiopia
Q1 2026 Pilot
Market entry with Ethiopia's largest processor to localize platform for Ethiopian breeds
1,000+ farms, first verified carbon credits
ReadyFarmer
### Leader Advisory services in Multiple Agri- Value Chains
Pakistan
2025-2026
Mega-network activation via plug-and-play platform deployment across existing farmer networks
15M farmers primed for activation
